win_condition: Reduce your opponent's hero to 0 HP. The game ends immediately when a hero is defeated.
message: Unmatched is an elimination duel -- reduce your opponent's hero to 0 HP to win. Little Red starts at 14 HP (Huntsman: 9 HP). Beowulf starts at 17 HP (Wiglaf: 6 HP). Track hero and sidekick health separately using the included health dials. Beowulf also tracks Rage (starts at 1, max 3) with flame tokens.

categories.label: Hero Health
categories.description: Track each hero's remaining HP on their health dial. Little Red starts at 14, Beowulf starts at 17. Hero at 0 HP ('The End') = defeated, game over.

categories.label: Sidekick Health
categories.description: Track each sidekick's remaining HP. Huntsman starts at 9, Wiglaf starts at 6. Sidekick at 0 HP is removed from the battlefield but does not end the game.

categories.label: Beowulf's Rage
categories.description: Track Beowulf's current Rage (0-3). Starts at 1. Gains 1 Rage when Beowulf takes damage (not Wiglaf). Spent for card effects. Use flame tokens: lit = active, unlit = spent.

categories.label: Little Red's Basket
categories.description: The top card of Little Red's discard pile is her basket. Check the banner for the current item: knife, pelt, wolfsbane, or wild. Basket effects on cards only trigger if the correct item is showing.

categories.label: Door Status
categories.description: Track which of the 3 Heorot doors are open or closed. Closed doors block movement, attacks, adjacency, and split zones. Close for free during Maneuver; open costs 1 movement.
